name: CheckPeople

steps: Open the Suppression Center at the opt-out URL.
Enter your email address and agree to the terms.
Open the verification email and click the link to confirm the suppression.

notes: Email-based suppression: you submit only an email, so the opt-out itself doesn't force disclosing your name history. Support: support@checkpeople.com / 1-800-267-2122. Re-check periodically; people-search sites re-list.
attribution: Derived from Big-Ass Data Broker Opt-Out List (CC BY-NC-SA).
